reviews.review_description: The game is really good but the bad thing is that when the level 1 and level 3 monsters (the same monsters) chase you you start to lag so much and you should make an inivisible barrier on the door (of level 3 to that when you open it there us level 4) so when you open it the level 3 monster cant get in there

I agree I can’t really join and it looks so fun so pls fix. But it looks like a really fun game!

Guys don’t worry, the game is just getting a remake it will be better than the original. So it’s not hacked and it’s not getting shut down it’s just getting a remake to make it more fun. (Owner of primal fear if you reading this, you did an amazing job on this game I’m glad you made it for us to play and I’m so hyped for this remake.
